narrative:
Precinct Monroe Twp & Pitsburg Village (precinct in Darke County) has 1,118 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.2 percentage points.
